challenges.title: Hello Rust
challenges.description: Print exactly `Hello, World!`. Expected output: `Hello, World!`.

steps.title: Understand the goal

steps.explanation: Run the code with the example case and confirm the output/return value matches exactly.

challenges.title: Paren Shield

challenges.title: Interval Fuse
challenges.description: Write `merge_intervals(intervals: &[[i32; 2]]) -> Vec<[i32; 2]>` merging overlaps. Example: `[[1,3],[2,6],[8,10]] -> [[1,6],[8,10]]`.
challenges.hint: Sort by start then merge against the last output interval.

challenges.title: Top K Words
challenges.description: Write `top_k_frequent(words: &[&str], k: usize) -> Vec<String>` returning top-k by frequency, lexicographic tiebreak. Example: `["i","love","i","code"],2 -> ["i","code"]`.
challenges.hint: Count with HashMap then sort entries by count desc and word asc.

challenges.title: Deep Flatten
challenges.description: Define enum `Nested { Num(i32), List(Vec<Nested>) }` and write `flatten_deep(items: &[Nested]) -> Vec<i32>` returning depth-first flattened numbers. Example: `[Num(1), List(vec![Num(2), List(vec![Num(3)])])] -> [1,2,3]`.
challenges.hint: Use recursion to walk nested lists.
